Pine Script.description: Executed inside TradingView Pine Script on every bar close
Pine Script.capabilities: Access to all OHLCV data, indicators, strategy state (position_size, etc.), barstate flags
Pine Script.limitations: Cannot make external HTTP calls. Cannot access broker state directly. Cannot persist state across sessions without var declarations.

Webhook Receiver.description: Executed by the webhook endpoint before passing to TradersPost
Webhook Receiver.capabilities: Full access to payload, can maintain state (signal_id cache, payload hash cache), can make HTTP calls
Webhook Receiver.limitations: Cannot access TradingView Pine state directly. Cannot query broker positions directly.

TradersPost.description: Executed by TradersPost before routing to Tradovate
TradersPost.capabilities: Access to broker connection status, account status, pending orders
TradersPost.limitations: Cannot access Pine Script state. Relies on payload data for signal context.

External Atlas Service.description: A future external service (e.g., Atlas Monitor) that reconciles Pine and broker state
External Atlas Service.capabilities: Can query both TradingView (via REST API) and Tradovate simultaneously
External Atlas Service.limitations: Requires additional infrastructure. Not available in current production setup.
External Atlas Service.interim_solution: For now, C5-06 is handled by TradersPost position query + manual reconciliation if mismatch detected
